name: Bean
story: Bean is a small black shadow who decides carefully and loves completely. He watches a new room from the doorway, then claims it — and you — for good.
Black cats wait longest for homes, and nobody has told Bean why. Whoever figures him out first gets a devoted, velvet-quiet companion.

medical.notes: Vaccinated and neutered. A clean check-up, twice in a row.

photoAlt: Bean, a sleek black cat, sitting neatly with bright round eyes
